title: Kimi API Platform
rawContent: Kimi API Platform Platform Documentation Pricing Contact Sales Developer Console User Center 🎉 Kimi K2.7 Code model has been officially released, Kimi's strongest Coding model. Limited-time promotion in progress . Kimi LLM Open Platform Build with Kimi API Transform energy into intelligence Get Started Trusted by millions of professional developers Latest Models Built for tasks of any scale—delivering fast, reliable performance with high quality results. K2.7 Code Kimi K2.7 Code, our most capable coding model to date. It follows instructions more reliably in long contexts, completes coding tasks with higher success rates. Cache Hit $0.19 / MTok Input $0.95 / MTok Output $4.00 / MTok K2.6 kimi-k2.6 is Kimi's latest and most intelligent model, possessing stronger and more stable long-term code writing capabilities and significantly enhances the Agent's autonomous execution capabilities Cache Hit $0.16 / MTok Input $0.95 / MTok Output $4.00 / MTok K2.5 kimi-k2.5 supports visual and text input, thinking and non-thinking modes, and dialogue and agent tasks Cache Hit $0.10 / MTok Input $0.60 / MTok Output $3.00 / MTok Official Tools, Plug and Play Reliable, production ready tools—integrate once and start building. View Documentation Web Search Web search tool enables large models to access the latest information, cite authoritative sources, making results verifiable and cutting-edge Rethink Intelligent idea organization tool Random-Choice Random selection tool Memory Memory storage and retrieval system tool, supporting persistence of conversation history, user preferences, and other data Excel Analysis tool for Excel and CSV files Code-Runner Python code execution tool Quick Js Tool for safely executing JavaScript code using the QuickJS engine Date Date and time processing tool Fetch URL content extraction and markdown formatting tool Convert Unit conversion tool, supporting physics units and currency conversion Base 64 Encoding and decoding tool Fast Execution for Complex Workflows A complete tool ecosystem that integrates general intelligence with vertical models—built for real world complexity. Agent Programming Built for complex software automation. Based on Kimi K2’s instruction following and logical reasoning capabilities, Kimi enables autonomous programming agents to handle debugging, refactoring, and multi-step development workflows with high precision. Deep Research and Reasoning Designed for long horizon, complex reasoning tasks. Leveraging the K2 Thinking model’s reasoning capability and up to 300-step tool calling, Kimi acts as an expert-level research assistant supporting strategic research, pricing and competitive analysis, stock and crypto investing analysis. Legal Intelligence Streamline high-stakes document workflows. Kimi is optimized for rigorous attention to detail, making it ideal for legal and IP scenarios. From automated contract review to complex patent analysis and drafting, the model ensures strict adherence to terminology and logical structures. Conversation Intelligence Extracting deep value from unstructured conversation data. Kimi excels in high fidelity conversation analysis, supporting use cases from psychological counseling quality assessment and public opinion monitoring to customer intent detection and key information extraction, including subtle linguistic signals. Powering Innovation Through Partnership Breaking resource boundaries to unlock exponential growth in core value—aligning to succeed together. Kimi offers SOTA-level performance at a fraction of the cost. It's tremendously good at long-context tasks across the codebase, as well as the day-to-day work needed to support an always-on agent like KiloClaw. #AgenticCoding Genspark runs its agent platform on Kimi K2 (0905), turning crisp instructions into autonomous agents that solve real world problems. #AIAgents Tencent CodeBuddy integrates Kimi K2 Thinking as its underlying model, providing core capabilities to help developers solve complex programming tasks and improve R&D efficiency. #AgenticCoding XtalPi integrates with the Kimi K2.5 model, instantly reading chemical formulas and charts, quickly extracting key points from cutting-edge literature, streamlining the R&D process, and accelerating drug/material decision-making. #AIforScience AlphaEngine integrates with Kimi K2 Thinking to create a FinGPT Agent. It supports over 300 tool calls, deeply analyzes massive amounts of research reports and financial data, and automates macroeconomic analysis, supply chain breakdown, and in-depth report writing. #FinancialResearch DP Technology, an AI-for-Science unicorn, highlights Kimi K2.5's dominance in chemical literature understanding—ranking Top 2 on both RxnBench benchmarks alongside closed-source leaders like Gemini-3 and GPT-5.2, leaving open-source competitors decisively behind. #AIforScience Kimi offers SOTA-level performance at a fraction of the cost. Flexible Pay-As-You-Go Ideal for individual developers and small teams Flexible pay-as-you-go billing: On-demand, usage based pricing with transparent and controllable costs Lightning fast access: One click Kimi model calls with no setup required Tiered usage benefits: Automatically unlock higher rate limits based on cumulative spend Get Started Enterprise Solutions & Customization Designed for medium and large enterprises High performance architecture: Flexible rate limits and support for multi project deployments Security and compliance assurance: SLA backed reliability with data compliance and privacy protections Dedicated technical support: Priority response and model performance optimization Contact Sales Contact Forum Discord Email Us Legal Platform Terms of Service Privacy Policy Company Moonshot Website Kimi Kimi Code
